name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the milk and peanut butter together until smooth.
2. Add the instant chocolate pudding mix to the mixture.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
4. Chill the pie for at least 2 hours before serving.
5. Serve with a dab of Cool Whip whipped topping on top.
